raw.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: APUE is an equity ETF with a total of 452 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.89%, Apple at 6.10%, Dimensional U.S. Small Cap ETF at 4.60%, Microsoft at 4.17%, and Amazon.com at 3.33%.

overview.description: The ActivePassive U.S. Equity ETF (APUE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund blends an active and passive management approach to build its portfolio. The fund aims to optimize costs, tracking and potentially produce higher returns by shifting exposure between active and passive investments in the broad US equity market APUE was launched on May 3, 2023 and is issued by Envestnet.
